sections.paragraph:
Megiddo H4023
Called also Megiddon, and probably Armageddon.
A city in Issachar, situated on the southern edge of the plain of Esdraelon
Jos 17:11; 1Ch 7:29
Conquest of, by Joshua
Jos 12:21
Walled by Solomon
1Ki 9:15
Included in one of Solomon's commissary districts
1Ki 4:12
Ahaziah dies at
2Ki 9:27
Valley of, Deborah defeats Sisera in
Jdg 5:19
Josiah slain at, by Pharaoh Nechoh
2Ki 23:30; 2Ch 35:24
Prophecy concerning
Zec 12:11
